---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
Clear description of the feature you would like.

## Use Case
What problem does this solve? How would you use it?

## Module / Component
- **Applies to:** (Peripherals / Display / Camera / Math / Signal / IoT / GUI / Chips / Metadata / CI / Docs / Tooling)
- **SoM family:** (E1M-AEN / E1M-X V2N / E1M-X V2N-M1 / All)
- **OS target:** (Bare-metal / Zephyr / Yocto Linux / All)

## Proposed API shape
If you have one, the C signatures (or new Kconfig options) you'd like to land.  The maintainers
fold this into a `VERSIONS.md` row before implementation starts.

## Roadmap fit
Which milestone in [`VERSIONS.md`](../../VERSIONS.md) does this belong to (v0.x / v1.x)?
"Not in the roadmap" is a fine answer — propose where it should slot.

## Priority
(Nice to have / Important / Critical)

## Additional Context
References, examples from other SDKs, or mockups.
